# ADR Template

Use this template for new Architecture Decision Records.

## Title

_Status:_ Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded by [ADR-XXXX](XXXX-title.md)

_Date:_ YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

What is the issue that we're seeing that is motivating this decision or change?

## Decision

What is the change that we're proposing and/or doing?

## Consequences

### Positive

•⁠ ⁠What becomes easier?

### Negative

•⁠ ⁠What becomes harder?

### Neutral

•⁠ ⁠What other changes might need to happen?
